title: Some Reports about al -Wathiq
description: Al-Husayn b. al-QahhAk201 reported that he saw al-Wathiq a few days after al-Mu`ta^im died. He was seated at the first soiree that 196. Al-Hasan b. Sahl was court astrologer and finance minister and governor for al-Ma'mun; d. 236 (85o-51); Bosworth, Reunification, Index, 272; Sourdel, Vizirat, Index, 766, and especially 215-18; Sezgin, GAS, VII, 122; E12, s.v. His brother al-Fadl b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
